notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.description: Enable or disable notifications of start and end of meeting

storage.title: Data Storage Locations
storage.description: View and access where Meetily stores your data
storage.note: Note: Database and models are stored together in your application data directory for unified management.

recording.title: Recording Settings
recording.description: Configure how your audio recordings are saved during meetings.
recording.save_recordings_desc: Automatically save audio files when recording stops
recording.recording_path_template: Recordings are saved with timestamp: recording_YYYYMMDD_HHMMSS.{format}
recording.recording_disabled_note: Audio recording is disabled. Enable "Save Audio Recordings" to automatically save your meeting audio.

transcript.title: Transcript Settings
transcript.hotwords_description: Enter one company name, project name, person, or mixed Chinese/English term per line.
transcript.hotwords_placeholder:
Meetily
Project Galaxy
K8s
Manager Chen
transcript.hotwords_local_whisper_only: Applies only to local Whisper. Changes take effect for the next recording, audio import, or retranscription.

stats.title: Hotword hit rate
stats.description: Shows how often each configured hotword fires during ASR. Entries older than 30 days without hits are cleared automatically.
stats.empty: No hotword has fired yet. Hotwords will appear here once they are recognized during a recording.

language.click_to_set_default: Click any language to set it as your default. Max 5 quick-switch options.
language.description: Pin one language as the default for new meetings. Unpinned languages remain as quick-switch options in the summary generator. Auto uses the dominant transcript language.

summary.auto_description: Auto Generating summary after meeting completion (Stopping)
summary.model_description: Configure the AI model used for generating meeting summaries.
summary.failover_hint: Automatically fall back to a secondary provider if the primary fails.
summary.failover_warning: Each provider may bill your account separately. Use only when reliability outweighs cost.
summary.failover_empty: No fallback providers configured. Add one or more below.

analytics.consent_description: Help improve Meetily by sharing anonymous usage statistics.
analytics.title: Usage Analytics
analytics.description: Usage analytics is off by default. You can turn it on to share anonymous product and performance data; no personal content is collected.
analytics.off_default: Off unless you choose to enable it
analytics.user_id_desc: Share this ID when reporting issues to help us investigate your issue logs
analytics.privacy_note: Your meetings, transcripts, and recordings remain completely private and local.
analytics.privacy_protected_body: Analytics is off by default. If you enable it, we collect anonymous usage data only. No meeting content, names, file paths, or personal information is ever collected.
analytics.cat1_note: Helps us understand which models users prefer
analytics.cat2_note: Helps us optimize performance and understand usage patterns
analytics.cat3_note: Helps us improve compatibility, NOT the actual device names
analytics.cat5_item2: App version (automatically included in all events)
analytics.dont_item2: File names, file paths, or meeting folders

permission.mic_body: Meetily needs access to your microphone to record meetings. No microphone devices were detected.
permission.mic_l1: Your microphone is connected and powered on
permission.mic_l2: Microphone permission is granted in System Settings
permission.mic_l3: No other app is exclusively using the microphone
permission.system_only_mic: System audio capture is not available. You can still record with your microphone, but computer audio won't be captured.
permission.system_with_mic: System audio capture is also not available.
permission.macos_help_title: To enable system audio on macOS:
permission.macos_l1: Install a virtual audio device (e.g., BlackHole 2ch)
permission.macos_l2: Grant Screen Recording permission to Meetily
permission.macos_l3: Configure your audio routing in Audio MIDI Setup

empty_state.title: No Summary Generated Yet
empty_state.description: Generate an AI-powered summary of your meeting transcript to get key points, action items, and decisions.
empty_state.select_model_first: Please select a model in Settings first

about.tagline: Real-time notes and summaries that never leave your machine.
about.latest_version: You are running the latest version
about.privacy_desc: Your data & AI processing workflow can now stay within your premise. No cloud, no leaks.
about.model_desc: Prefer local open-source model? Great. Want to plug in an external API? Also fine. No lock-in.
about.cost_desc: Avoid pay-per-minute bills by running models locally (or pay only for the calls you choose).
about.works_desc: Google Meet, Zoom, Teams-online or offline.
about.coming_soon: Coming soon: A library of on-device AI agents-automating follow-ups, action tracking, and more.
about.cta_title: Ready to push your business further?
about.cta_desc: If you're planning to build privacy-first custom AI agents or a fully tailored product for your business, we can help you build it.

modal.show_confidence_desc: Display colored dots showing transcription confidence quality

update.will_restart: The app will restart automatically after installation
update.installed_toast: Update installed successfully. The app will restart...

recovery.dialog_description_one: We found an interrupted meeting. The recording stopped before the transcript was completed.
recovery.dialog_description_other: We found {count} interrupted meetings. The recording stopped before the transcripts were completed.
recovery.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this interrupted meeting? This action cannot be undone.
